[AUTO-TEST] ## Auto-triggered: Write tests for new commits in Timesheet

### Recent Commits
- d0589768: fix: Help sidebar link opens user manual in new tab

### Changed Source Files (1)
- frontend/src/app/(authenticated)/layout.tsx


### Instructions
1. Read the changed files to understand what was modified
2. Write/update tests to cover the new/changed functionality
3. Focus on the most critical paths — don't test every line
4. Tests should pass with: `cd frontend && npx playwright test`
5. Report: files created/modified, test count, coverage summary
